import asyncio


async def poll_for_result(check_fn, interval=0):
    while True:
        result = check_fn()
        if result is not None:
            return result
        await asyncio.sleep(0)


async def wait_for_ready(ready_fn):
    while not ready_fn():
        await asyncio.sleep(0)


async def spin_until_done(task_id: str):
    while True:
        status = get_task_status(task_id)
        if status == "done":
            break
        await asyncio.sleep(0)
